use_cases: Selecting date ranges across multiple months for booking systems
Viewing availability and schedules spanning several months
Planning events or appointments with extended date visibility
Comparing dates or availability across different months side-by-side
Date input for forms requiring multi-month context
ai_summary: A multi-month calendar component for displaying and selecting dates across consecutive months. Features navigation between months, date selection capabilities, and a clean interface for date range picking and scheduling workflows. Part of the Ruixen.UI component library designed for modern SaaS and business applications.
